content:
Double Negative Structure

စာကြောင်းတစ်ခုထဲမှာ not ၊ never လို negative စကားလုံး နှစ်လုံး ပါနေရင် Double Negative ဖြစ်တယ်။ အင်္ဂလိပ်စာမှာ ဒါက မှားတယ်။ negative နှစ်လုံး ပေါင်းလိုက်ရင် positive ဖြစ်သွားလို့ပါ။ တစ်လုံးတည်းပဲ ထားရမယ်။

Structure/Formula: ❌ Subject + not + never/none/nothing/nowhere (WRONG)
✅ Subject + not + any/anything/anywhere (CORRECT)

👉 Wrong: I don't know nothing. → Correct: I don't know anything.

👉 Wrong: She isn't going nowhere today. → Correct: She isn't going anywhere today.

👉 Wrong: He didn't say nothing about the exam. → Correct: He didn't say anything about the exam.

👉 Wrong: We can't find no solution to this problem. → Correct: We can't find any solution to this problem.

🔑 Key Points:

  • Negative စကားလုံး တစ်လုံးတည်းပဲ သုံးရမယ်
  • not + never/none/nothing/nowhere လုံးဝ မတွဲရ
  • not + any/anything/anywhere ကိုသာ တွဲသုံးရမယ်
  • none/nothing/nowhere ကို သုံးချင်ရင် verb ကို positive ပဲထားရမယ်

⚠️ Common Mistakes:

  • I don't need no help ❌ → I don't need any help ✅
  • She didn't say nothing ❌ → She didn't say anything ✅
  • He isn't going nowhere ❌ → He isn't going anywhere ✅
